name: @openclaw-compact-context/control-plane-shell
description: Control-plane server shell and console entrypoints for the compact context platform

scripts.build: npm --prefix ../.. run build --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/contracts && npm --prefix ../.. run build --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/control-plane-core && node ../../scripts/clean-dist.mjs ./dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.check: npm --prefix ../.. run build --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/contracts && npm --prefix ../.. run build --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/control-plane-core && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
